name: Karen
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties involving underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas and suggestions not being accepted.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't perform perfectly, I will be criticized and dismissed.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to be respected or valued at work.
coping_strategies: Avoid confrontation and internalize feelings of frustration.
situation: Colleagues praise a coworker and ask the patient for help with technology issues related to that coworker.
auto_thought: They don't value my contributions and only see my mistakes.
behavior: Avoids speaking up in meetings and internalizes stress.
